companies.title: Companies
companies.description: Company or product names to search for. Use the name as it appears on the review site (e.g. "monday.com", "HubSpot CRM").

maxReviewsPerPlatform.title: Max reviews per platform
maxReviewsPerPlatform.description: Maximum number of reviews to collect per company per platform. Up to 500.

minRating.title: Minimum star rating
minRating.description: Only collect reviews at or above this rating (1–5). Leave blank for all ratings.

trustpilotApiKey.title: Trustpilot API key (optional)
trustpilotApiKey.description: Free API key from developers.trustpilot.com. Provides more structured data. If omitted, Trustpilot is scraped directly.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Proxy settings. Residential proxies improve G2 and Capterra success rates.
